'''dajoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabbi|rabbi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-j-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabbi|rabbi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dajoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæjeseth|dæjeseth]] || [[word:dæjesej|dæjesej]] || [[word:dæjesesh|dæjesesh]] || [[word:dæjese|dæjese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dajojosoth|dajojosoth]] || [[word:dajojosoj|dajojosoj]] || [[word:dajojososh|dajojososh]] || [[word:dajojoso|dajojoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dajosoth|dajosoth]] || [[word:dajosoj|dajosoj]] || [[word:dajososh|dajososh]] || [[word:dajoso|dajoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dajofsoth|dajofsoth]] || [[word:dajofsoj|dajofsoj]] || [[word:dajofsosh|dajofsosh]] || [[word:dajofsof|dajofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dajosotho|dajosotho]] || [[word:dajosojo|dajosojo]] || [[word:dajososho|dajososho]] || [[word:dajosoko|dajosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dajosoth|dajosoth]] || [[word:dajosoj|dajosoj]] || [[word:dajososh|dajososh]] || [[word:dajoso|dajoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dajosothol|dajosothol]] || [[word:dajosojol|dajosojol]] || [[word:dajososhol|dajososhol]] || [[word:dajosokol|dajosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dajosothotho|dajosothotho]] || [[word:dajosojojo|dajosojojo]] || [[word:dajososhosho|dajososhosho]] || [[word:dajosoko|dajosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dajosothon|dajosothon]] || [[word:dajosojon|dajosojon]] || [[word:dajososhon|dajososhon]] || [[word:dajosokon|dajosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dajosothoro|dajosothoro]] || [[word:dajosojoro|dajosojoro]] || [[word:dajososhoro|dajososhoro]] || [[word:dajosokoro|dajosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
